Include a pre-rendered mermaid diagram

Source: R/utils-misc.R
include_mermaid.Rd

Renders mermaid .mmd source to .svg when the source is newer than the existing SVG and mmdc is available, then includes the SVG via knitr::include_graphics().

Usage

include_mermaid(name, chromium_args = c("--no-sandbox"))

Arguments

name

Diagram name (without extension), resolved relative to a mermaid/ directory alongside the calling document.

chromium_args

Character vector of extra Chromium flags passed to mmdc via a temporary puppeteer config file.

On this page
